\tzpentry{ID5485}{Module Integrand Brownian Path Partition Ito Stochastic Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5485 introduces Module Integrand Brownian Path Partition Ito Stochastic Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$ Module[{integrand, brownian_path, partition}, (* Ito stochastic integral with quantum correction *) ∫_0^t f(s, X_s) dW_s := Limit[ Sum[ f[t_{i-1}, X_{t_{i-1}}] * (W_{t_i} - W_{t_{i-1}}), {i, 1, n} ], n $
\]
